key.name: service-state
key.description: Written by the GNOME extension when it toggles the service. "warming" = systemctl start is in flight; "ready" = start exited 0 (systemd held it until Type=notify READY=1); "error" = non-zero exit; "stopped" = service inactive.

key.name: hotkey
key.description: Must match one of voicekb.config.HOTKEY_PRESETS. Reserved for a future extension preference pane; the daemon currently reads its hotkey from the ExecStart argv.
